## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an [x]. -->

- [ ] 🚀 `feat` — New feature
- [ ] 🐛 `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — Code refactor (no feature change, no bug fix)
- [ ] 📝 `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 `test` — Add or update tests
- [ ] 🛠️ `chore` — Build process, dependencies, or tooling
- [ ] ⚡ `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] 🎨 `style` — Code style / formatting (no logic change)

## Checklist

<!-- Complete this checklist before requesting a review. -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guide (ran `dart format`)
- [ ] No linter warnings (`flutter analyze` passes)
- [ ] No debug `print()` statements left in code
- [ ] TODOs are tracked as GitHub Issues (not left as inline comments)

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated for new/changed logic
- [ ] Widget tests added / updated for new/changed UI
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`melos run test`)
- [ ] Coverage remains at or above 70%

### Documentation
- [ ] Public APIs are documented with dartdoc comments
- [ ] `README.md` updated if applicable
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Architecture docs updated if design changed (`ARCHITECTURE.md`)

### Code Generation
- [ ] `build_runner` was run after modifying annotated classes
- [ ] Generated files (`*.g.dart`, `*.freezed.dart`) are committed

### Mobile Specific *(if applicable)*
- [ ] Tested on Android (physical or emulator)
- [ ] Tested on iOS (physical or simulator)
- [ ] Deep-link / GoRouter changes tested

### Web Specific *(if applicable)*
- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Responsive layout verified (mobile, tablet, desktop breakpoints)

## Notes for Reviewers

<!-- Anything specific the reviewer should focus on, known limitations, or follow-up work. -->
